title: アグネスデジタル登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training center. No matter what time of day,
she's always here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's here rain or shine, and even on the days
training isn't scheduled.

text_block_list.name: Opera O and Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaah!
Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh, Overlord T.M. Opera O. As gallant and
beautiful as ever. And...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's Meisho Doto chasing after her with her
single-minded gaze. Ahhh... Truly divine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I knew there was something about those two!
Before she knows it, Doto'll catch up and be
welcomed with open arms. And then, at last...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh! I have to stop myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Agnes Digital. She's your average
Umamusume... or so she says. The one thing is—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if it isn't my trainer—my kindred spirit! Look!
The Umas are as wonderful as ever today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Come. There's space for you next to me in the
front row. Let us raise our prayers to our divine
oshis.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She loves Umamusume with her entire heart and
believes I'm as much of an "Horsegirl simp" as she is.
choice_data_list:
By the way, I have something to talk to you
about.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay. What is it? I don't suppose you've
found a cute little newcomer ready for her debut?
choice_data_list: As a matter of fact, I have.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oooh, that's my trainer! So, what's her name?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Heheheh, that's not a bad name! Agnes Digi...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait, whaaat?! You don't mean...
choice_data_list: It's time to make your Twinkle Series debut.
It's time to make your Twinkle Series debut.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hooo! At last, I'm off to the land of paradise
beyond the clouds—to the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'll be allowed the chance to
behold, with my very own eyes, heavenly
Umamusume heretofore unreachable to me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mwahahee! I feel like I'm about to melt into a
puddle of emotion! I've got so many oshis in both
the dirt and turf tours.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You remember the promise we made that day,
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I could have forgotten it...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sorry, I don't think I heard you right. You're telling me not to pick? That I should run both?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
To run wild? On any track I want?! Even if I'll
never be as good as my oshis, I'm at least good
enough to make it through the series?
choice_data_list:
Yeah! You've got what it takes to be an
all-rounder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: AND IIIIIIIIII WILL ALWAYS LOVE UUUUMAS!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, you've won me over! I'll be an
all-rounder! I'll run turf and dirt and admire all my
oshis up close!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll run both turf and dirt races—That's the
promise I made when I signed on to be her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I am an all-rounder! These tempered legs of mine
will carry me beside every Umamusume there is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
From this point forward, I'll embark on a journey
building karma so that I may behold the presence
of the highest order of Horsegirl angels.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Digital. Hello...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do my ears deceive me, or did I just hear you
announce a decision to make your debut?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Opera O and Doto... W-well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These two are T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto.
They're a year above Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is a self-absorbed racer who talks
the talk and walks the walk. She's already winning
graded races and is a strong contender in the
Classics.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha ha! I am the Overlord! And this year's
Satsuki Sho is as good as mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Meisho Doto is a bit clumsy.
Her results are nothing to write home about, but
she's known for having a hidden strength when
push comes to shove.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'm still no match for Opera O, but I'll do
my best...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital, if it's true you are to make your debut, I
would take the news with great joy, however...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
N-no! It hasn't been decided at all. That's just a
baseless rumor that was put out on social media.
choice_data_list: But you just agreed with my decision.
But you just agreed with my decision.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Shhh! Hush! Don't say that! Our lips are sealed,
okay?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Aha ha ha! So, that's the issue.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Digital is afraid of the Hawthorne Effect. It's when
you become overly aware of yourself because
you're being observed by others.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You're... Digital's roommate Agnes Tachyon,
right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As part of my Umamusume research, I observe her
day and night. This tendency of hers was
immediately obvious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
She is afraid her existence will be a burden to
other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um, I-I don't know if I would say "I'm afraid." I
just feel it's kind of impudent to make them
notice me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm perfectly content to watch everyone from the
quiet comfort of a priv account they can't see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So please, pay me no mind! I just want you
excellent people to enjoy a conversation amongst
yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's creed is that she is no more than a
fan, and there must be a clear line between
herself and the Umamusume she so worships.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think it's too passive an attitude, considering
she'll be competing against them moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With that said... I'm gonna savor the golden
opportunity to run in the Twinkle Series with
every last fiber of my being!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: All while not getting in the way. I'll simp inconspicuously from the front lines.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Trainer! Now that it's decided, let's hurry
up and get training!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna start with the course Opera O and Doto
just finished running! Their lovely scent still
lingers in the air... Mmm, yes! Yessss!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is afire with passion in the face of
her coveted debut. She's undoubtedly an odd
duck, but it's impossible to dislike her. I vow to
watch over her as she builds her future.
